feed.title: SAP Community - SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central
feed.subtitle: SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Visibility work seniority result
entry.content:
In the last release (1H 2024) SAP released new functionality to calculate employee work seniority based on MDF objects (https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_SUCCESSFACTORS_RELEASE_INFORMATION/8e0d540f96474717bbf18df51e54e522/3d58995c3ad540d5b18d24f112a7c577.html?parentHref=/whats-new/8fcf4960eea24f78b1d7613da406a885?Version=1H%202024&q=seniority&locale=en-US&parentName=SAP%20SuccessFactors%20What's%20New&locale=en-US).

This is great functionality to calculate the seniority; but it seems that there is no UI available to make the results visible to employees/managers on the people profile (no element to add and it does not seem possible to create a custom UI for the MDF object). Are we missing something? In the implementation guide I also don't see anything around visibility of the result (https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_SUCCESSFACTORS_EMPLOYEE_CENTRAL/c18eb6c8febd4d7c924db8a257ce940d/37d55f65235c4f6690241f45f68055bb.html?q=seniority&locale=en-US).

entry.title: Job History view for previously in target Employees
entry.content:
Hi,

We are looking for an approach to cover the following scenario:

  • Employee A has been hired from 2020 to 2023 in a US legal entity
  • from 1.1.2023 the employee has been moved to Italy (terminated in US and re-hired in Italy)

HRs have a RBP with a target on specific legal entity and the HR in US, from 1.1.2023 cannot view anymore the information related to the employee who has been moved.

When navigating to the profile, he has not an HR view on his data, neither changing the effective as of date of visualization and, moreover, when HR makes reports with effective date e.g. in 2021 the employee does not appear for US HR because he is not in the target anymore.

Any suggestion on how to fix the situation?

entry.title: Is standard field Employee Profile "country" syncronized with the "Country/Region" in Job Info?
entry.content:
Dear Community,

we would like to know if the standard "country" field in Manage Business Configuration --> Employee Profile --> Standard --> country is connected through standard sync with the "Country/Region" field in Job Information. 

Thank you in advance for your time.

entry.title: Where i can see Hr org replication at S4Hana public cloud?
entry.content: Where i can see org replication while replicating Employee from sap success factors EC to S4Hana public cloud. Employee replicated as worker but can’t see the assigned org ( position, department, division and so on )

entry.title: How to hide the confirmation page on mobile browser
entry.content:
Hello everyone,I'm a beginner in sf.
I would like to ask a question here.

My customer wants to use it from a mobile browser.
Therefore, when you click on the workflow summary, the following screen will be displayed.
Since I am not using sap mobile app,
I would like to launch the mobile browser directly without displaying this screen.
Has anyone else experience this? Thank you!

 

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Close

Cause 

This is expected behavior and cannot be disabled.

entry.title: Additional parameter to determine Pay Range
entry.content:
Our Pay Ranges are identified by the std 3 fields:

  • Pay Grade
  • Geozone
  • Legal Entity

we wish to add an additional criteria to fine tune the pay ranges.

I have enabled a custom field on the Corporate Data Model and it is validated by a picklist.
I have also added a field to JobInfo which is validated by the same picklist.

The system is NOT responding to the extra parameter which seems to imply that I am missing an association somewhere.
Any assistance would be greatly appreciated.

TIA,

sandy

entry.title: vacancy report
entry.content:
Good Day,

Please how do i pull out a position vacancy report from SuccessFactors using story reporting? #Successfactors 

Regards

entry.title: PEP process in SF TimeOff before the bookable end date
entry.content:
For a customer we have a leave type with Quota called Annual Leave. Employee will be entitled to get every year 32 days of quota annually.

Now customer has requested the below things for Annual leave.

1.  Employee should be able to apply the leave till Feb end next year - Which is Possible in SF by setting the bookable period to till Feb end.
2.  Employee should be able to apply leave for next year Jan and Feb by Dec 31st of present year from present existing quota – Tried to control via Business Rule, but none of them worked.
3.  After point 1 and 2 PEP needs to be executed on 1st Jan of next year to post 10 and below left out balances to new Time Account(year) bucket. - PEP cannot be executed before as bookable period in point 1 is till Feb end of next year nor interim rule can be used to run as there will be future dated leaves in Jan and Feb.

Can you provide the solution/options for Point 2 and 3.

entry.title: What data can you use Bulk Uploads for?
entry.content:
Our business owners are interested to understand if we can use 'Bulk Uploads' for tasks which we currently carry out manually and individually for employees. One example given was the changing of hours for employees, currently we do this on a individual basis, but sometimes there can be a large number to process, can Bulk Uploads be used to do this?

If your business uses Bulk Uploads, what tasks do you use it for?

entry.title: Issue when exposing Succesfactor API through CAPM
entry.content:
Im Following the Developer Tutorial https://developers.sap.com/mission.btp-extend-sfsf-cap.html

and I had followed all the code and Destination as per the Tutorial.

Have imported the edmx 

package.json

lib/handler.js : 

Service.cds 

Getting the error when try to hit the GET on 

@ale_biagi Help us to understand if we are missing something  we are just Reading the Data and not doing any Create or Update. We are not able to Read the SF API from CAP as mentioned in tutorial https://developers.sap.com/mission.btp-extend-sfsf-cap.html

and Community blog 

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/extend-sap-successfactors-on-sap-btp-with-cap-add-business-logic/ba-p/13526502

Thanks 

Sahasranaman

entry.title: Pre approval for overtime in Time Management
entry.content:
Dear community, 

Our customer would like to build a pre-approval process for the Managers to request their collaborators to do some overtime. 

We have built something similar with extra time types, but they would like to give the manager the option to ask the employee to perform an amount of hours of overtime in advance, and then the employee would decide when and how distribute them. Instead of the manager deciding when, the employee would adapt his work hours to perform that overtime along the week. 

Example: 

Manager: I want you to work next week +5 hours. 

Employee: would work his theoretical working time and would decide to perform the overtime:

  • tuesday from 17 to 18 +1 hour
  • wednesday from 17 to 20 +3 hours
  • friday from 16 to 17 +1 hour. 

Is it somehow feasible to build in Time Management?

Thank you in advance,

Laura

entry.title: Time Account Balance is Duplicated
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We have an issue for Admins viewing Netherlands Time Accounts in the Time Off section on the Profile. As the Time Type 'Annual Leave' is mapped to 2 Time Accounts, it shows both accounts, but includes the balance for the second in the first. This is confusing and has led to employees being informed they have more leave than they actually do. e.g. like below, the total in green includes the total in red:

I understand that this is 'expected behaviour' (e.g 2699477), but has anyone found a way around this? I have tried renaming it to make it obvious, but then this shows in reports... Appreciate the advice!

Thanks, Liam

entry.title: SF Learning reports restrict remote option
entry.content:
In SF Learning Reports, I am scheduling the User Item Status report to write the file to our SFTP server (using the "remote" option).   Is there a way to restrict other administrators from using the remote option in SF Learning reports (via security?)?  I don't want someone to run the report with a different selection criteria and write to the SFTP server. 

The only other option I can think of is creating a custom report that is a copy of the delivered report and restrict access to the new report (and update REPORT_SYSTEM config).

entry.title: SAP GTS
entry.content:
HI ALL,

There 2 legal regulations for those having same material/products. and same general settings configurations. even 1 legal regulation triggered and 1 legal regulation is not. why?

entry.title: Auto populate second manager in job relationship
entry.content:
Hello Expert,

Need your help to give advice. We have requirement to populate second level manager in job relationship but we would like to have it auto populate instead of user input. Any input how to achieve this? We have position management enabled also.

Thank you,
Regards,

Vonny

entry.title: User ID generation in Onboarding with external ATS
entry.content:
Our landscape consists of: External ATS -> SuccessFactors Onboarding 2.0 -> SuccessFactors Employee Central.

Within this setup, we are unable to create a rule that enforces the generation of Person ID and User ID following the Employee Central Sequence (it seems that This business rule is honored only when the new hire is onboarded from SAP SuccessFactors Recruiting).

Has anyone found a potential workaround?

entry.title: How to populate the data from HRIS portlet to MDF portlet
entry.content:
Hello Experts, 

I need to populate the cost center as and when created in Job Information (HRIS) with date in Alternative Cost Distribution Portlet (MDF) with date. 

 

Thanks & Regards, 

Ashwani Gupta

entry.title: How PRod / Preview datacenter can have a feature down at the same time ?
entry.content:
We are experiencing severe feature down  in DC33 data center :

- in prod

- in preview

HR are unable to :

- terminate

- rehire

- update job/comp info

i would like to understand how it’s technically feasible that a change does impact both data centers at the same time .

is there some specific emergency changes that can be deployed in both datacenters at the same time ?

how can we find the latest change done from these category ?

entry.title: Test
entry.content: Test

entry.title: National ID Passport Field
entry.content:
Hi,

Our current requirement is that if a user does not have nationality details for a specific country, they must add their passport details in the National ID portlet. However, I noticed that during the EC implementation, the default configuration was applied, and passport information is missing for many countries. I am considering manually creating a passport field for all countries in BCUI, but I am unsure about the Display Format and Regular Expression for each country. I created a support ticket for assistance, but they mentioned there is no KBA available that lists the passport Display Format and Regular Expression for all countries, and they recommended submitting an enhancement request. Can anyone provide suggestions on this?
